laws.title: Noetfield www production surface
laws.truth: Cloudflare Pages noetfield-www + edge worker noetfield-www-proxy only

laws.title: Canonical NOOS control docs path
laws.truth: noetfeld-OS/noetfield-org/ only — workspace-root noetfield-org/ is stale

laws.title: Agent www deploy authority
laws.truth: Agents deploy via approved Noetfield www path — Noetfield/scripts/deploy-www-cloudflare.sh → Cloudflare Pages noetfield-www

laws.title: Brain taxonomy in public copy
laws.truth: No unqualified Brain — specify Library Live Brain, SourceA Brain Role, SourceA Website Brain Chat, NOOS Control Brain, or SG Library Spine

laws.title: NOOS integrator authority
laws.truth: noetfeld-OS is NOOS integrator; noetfield-studio-ide is sandbox manager only
